steps.title: Identify what Jeyifous did
steps.content: The sentence says Jeyifous [blank] “a series of new images” for a 2020 exhibition. The word new is the key signal: the blank must describe producing something original, not evaluating, disputing, or recovering existing work.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘validated’: means to confirm or corroborate; the text describes making images, not evaluating their legitimacy. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘created’: means produced or made; Jeyifous photographed models and layered images to produce new work, which is exactly what “created” describes. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘challenged’: means disputed or contested; nothing in the passage suggests Jeyifous was disputing the original posters or any prior claim. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘restored’: means to return something to a prior condition; Jeyifous made new images rather than reconditioning damaged ones. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
